series_metadata.series_description: Responses to survey questions used to compile Annual Report on the Cost of Health Insurance in Ohio''s Public Sector. Survey is conducted annually using electronic and paper formats. Information includes employer insurance information and plan data.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain for five (5) years after publication of report, and then destroy. ; Paper: Convert to electronic format. Once converted paper copy may be destroyed. Retain electronic format for five (5) years and then destroy., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Wastepaper
